title: Plains Villager Trader
description: Adds a Plains Trader. a new structure, and Highland Armor
body:
**This mod adds a new villager to the Plains biome.**

- The Plains Villager Trader can only be found in his new house, which spawns in the plains biome.
- You can also summon him anywhere by placing his Traderblock Workstation (found in every house structure) next to a jobless villager.

![Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d28d1a98a2e7c62ad5bf3c9e00bdd2c8cb835d.jpeg)


**Plains Villager Trader:**

- Buys and sells Plains-related items.
- Sells a brand-new Highland Armor set for the player.
  
![Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28319a0f3564d705e2c6a688a47f3d648ab9ece.jpeg)

 ![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/babc785da7f95164de8806d5bfcf6f8213672617.jpeg)


**Highland Armor:**

- Stats are slightly better than iron Armor.
- Wearing the full set grants the player the strength effect.
Can be repaired with iron.

![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2931cd2e1641e30aae8bacbf26352040e3205b89.jpeg)


 

 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks

Made by Leonxkingx
